chunks.text: Academics - EECS at Berkeley Academics Hani Gomez, JP Llinas, Carlos Biaou, Jodi Loo, and Akshay Pattabi, 2022 (photo: Audrey Sillers) Academics and Admissions Berkeley EECS offers one of the most comprehensive instructional and research programs available anywhere in our field. We have a particular strength in large interdisciplinary real-world system projects that bring to bear core technologies seamlessly across electrical engineering and computer science. Visit us Master’s student Gloria Tumushabe (B.S. ’20) (photo: Adam Lau) Graduate Degree Programs The goal of the EECS graduate programs is to develop each student’s capacity for original and incisive thinking. Become an EECS Grad Sophomores in EE84 “Hands on ham radio” launching a balloon from the roof of Cory Hall Courses Our roster of fine courses includes CS61A, named one of the “5 Best CS Classes in the US.” EE Class Schedule CS Class Schedule Learn More About Courses CS 169 student presentation Undergraduate Programs We provide a distinguished undergraduate education, with the flexibility to choose the program that works for you. Become an EECS Undergrad A Message to Prospective Women Students Messages from some of our women faculty and students, and some resources available to support women in EE and CS.
